planDocSection: §5 Milestone Breakdown — M36 row (Capabilities Taxonomy + Parser)
previousMilestoneCommit: a429abf (Phase 6 T0 — plan doc: Capabilities & Evidence)
status: Phase 6 T0 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 (commit a429abf). Phase 6 theme: 'Capabilities & Evidence — Maturing the Intelligence Layer' (retro §6 seeds #5 + #7 plus natural companions: Telemetry per-kind filter + insight feedback loop). 6-milestone placeholder M36 → M41. Head-of-queue now advances to M36 T0 — the first M36 session must author docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-m36-capabilities-taxonomy.md mirroring the Phase 5 milestone plan doc shape (structure + non-goals + architectural decisions). M36 scope per Phase 6 T0 plan doc §5: locked capability taxonomy (~40 capabilities across 6 categories: engineering / product / design / operations / strategy / support) in shared-types, role-schema parser gains capabilities: string[] field + validation + role-load-time errors for zero-capability roles, backfill of all 55 F10 roles + 2 system roles under role-packs/strategia-official/roles/. Zero new DB tables (decision D16 — capabilities live in role.md frontmatter per invariant #9). Cascading M37 is BLOCKED by M36 (role-fit v2 depends on capabilities taxonomy existing); M38 / M39 / M40 are independently parallelizable (do not share code surface with M36); M41 is phase-exit and depends on all prior. DO NOT author M36 T1+ breakdown in the M36 T0 plan doc — M36 T0 is plan-doc-only, mirroring Phase 5 M28 T0 and the just-shipped Phase 6 T0.

targets.m36T0: M36 T0 plan doc at docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-m36-capabilities-taxonomy.md — structural mirror of the Phase 5 M31/M32/M33/M34/M35 milestone plan shape. Required sections: Overview + non-goals, What ships (surface-deliverable-builds-on table), Task breakdown (T0 → T10 pattern), Invariants preserved (reference to Phase 6 design doc §3), Architectural decisions per §4.5 spec, Acceptance criteria (verification gates + commit cadence + atomic+ledger rule), References. Zero code / zero tests in M36 T0.
targets.m36SurfaceArea: Capability taxonomy enum lives in packages/shared-types (sibling to existing CopilotCategory / CopilotSeverity / PRIVACY_TIER_RANK constants). role-schema parser gains capabilities: string[] field with strict enum validation (role-pack-signed parse fails fast). All 55 F10 role.md files under role-packs/strategia-official/roles/ gain capabilities: [...] frontmatter. Two system roles (system-agent.md + system-copilot.md) also carry capabilities (distinct from the tools_allowed surface — tools_allowed gates runtime tool access; capabilities drives role-fit scoring). Zero new DB tables per decision D16.
targets.m36OpenQuestion: Q1 from Phase 6 T0 plan doc §9 lands at M36 T0: case-sensitivity of capability enum values. Recommendation is lowercase-snake_case for strict equality + IDE autocomplete; final call at M36 T0.

notes: Phase 6 T0 SHIPPED (commit a429abf — 'feat(phase-6-t0): Phase 6 T0 — plan doc (Capabilities & Evidence)'). Theme selection was EXPLICIT per this file's previous guidance — Rocky did not default-pick. Chose retrospective §6 seeds #5 (capabilities frontmatter on role.md, flagged by M32 four separate times as deferred) + #7 (insight export) with natural companions (Telemetry per-kind filter from M33's dangling runs.kind column + insight feedback loop via dismissal-pattern → category downrank). Rejected: seed #1 (needs real-world usage data Team-X doesn't generate by design — zero phone-home invariant #7), seed #3 (HIGH value autonomous action but needs own phase for safety/rollback/dry-run primitives), seeds #2/#4/#6 (strong themes but less evidence-backed for 'next phase' positioning). v1.1.0 → v1.2.0 additive release targeted.

Head-of-queue: M36 T0 (Capabilities Taxonomy + Parser plan doc). BLOCKS M37 (role-fit v2 depends on taxonomy existing). DOES NOT BLOCK M38 / M39 / M40 (independent code surface — could parallelize if Phase 6 spins up multiple work streams). M41 is phase-exit, depends on all prior.

Atomic + ledger commit cadence RESTORED from M34 deviation at M35 T1 and carried verbatim through M35 T10. Phase 6 preserves this: each task ships as one atomic feat/fix/docs commit followed by one chore(loki) ledger commit. No squashed multi-task commits.

Patterns to carry forward from Phase 5 into Phase 6 (unchanged): three-tier canned test seam (quartet pattern — any new agentic surface in Phase 6 MUST ship a matching test-side swap; M38 analyzer weight-multiplier qualifies as an analyzer-side surface, but reuses the existing test-copilot-provider.ts seam), pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, source-string-audit unit test lineage (now 5-deep: M35 T3 / T8 / T9 / T10 / Phase 6 T0 markers to come at M41 T10), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system filter sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, invariant #11 (IPC mutation must emit bus event — M38's copilot.weights.changed follows this), locked six-section phase retrospective structure (M41 retrospective lineage now 2-deep).

Verification recipe for Phase 6 milestones (unchanged from M35): (1) Node ABI: cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install. (2) pnpm test → target grows ~+25 per milestone on code-milestones, 0 on docs-milestones. (3) pnpm typecheck → clean at repo root (NOT workspace-scoped). (4) pnpm lint → 0 errors, ≤24 warnings. (5) Electron ABI: pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar. (6) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 12 specs / 13 cases at phase exit. (7) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build → production bundle succeeds. (8) pnpm dist:win → v1.2.0 installer at M41 phase exit.
